The '''''VCD987''''' was an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] serving in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it was ambushed while [[Mission to Drongar|bringing]] Republic reinforcements to the [[Battle of Drongar]], leading to the temporary capture of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kai Justiss]], [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]], and [[Sian Jeisel]] by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], although they were quickly released by the Count. However, all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]] onboard were killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]''

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
